executives.name: John Borshoff
executives.background: Mr. Borshoff is an experienced mining executive and geologist with more than 50 years' experience in the uranium industry. He was the founder and CEO of Paladin Energy Ltd. He is a Fellow of the Australian Institute of Company Directors and the AusIMM.

tenure_dates.title: Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Gillian Swaby
executives.background: Ms. Swaby has over 35 years' experience in the tertiary education and mining sectors. She has been involved in the uranium industry since 1984. She is a Fellow of the Governance Institute of Australia and the Australian Institute of Company Directors.

executives.name: Mark Pitts
executives.background: Mr. Pitts is a Fellow of the Institute of Chartered Accountants with more than 30 years' experience in statutory reporting and corporate compliance. He is a Partner in the corporate advisory firm Endeavour Corporate.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer and Company Secretary

board_of_directors.name: Chris Salisbury
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Salisbury is a highly experienced mining executive with over 30 years' experience across senior operational and strategic leadership roles. He was previously Chief Executive of Rio Tinto Iron Ore.

board_of_directors.name: John Borshoff
board_of_directors.background: Founder and CEO of Paladin Energy Ltd. Geologist with over 50 years of experience.

board_of_directors.name: Gillian Swaby
board_of_directors.background: Extensive experience in corporate administration and uranium industry.

board_of_directors.name: Greg Meyerowitz
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Meyerowitz was a senior audit partner at EY for 26 years. He has extensive experience in the resources sector and is a member of the Australian Institute of Company Directors.

board_of_directors.name: Victoria Jackson
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Jackson is an experienced lawyer and executive with over 25 years' experience in the mining and energy sectors. She has held senior roles at South32 and BHP.

board_of_directors.name: Tim McLernon
board_of_directors.background: Mr. McLernon has over 30 years' experience in the mining industry, specifically in project development and operations. He was previously with Rio Tinto and Paladin Energy.
